name: Permesan Chicken Wings Oreganata
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken wings, cut into pieces and bones removed.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a paper bag, combine the cheese, parsley, paprika, oregano, basil, salt, and pepper. Toss to mix.
3. Pour the melted butter into a shallow bowl.
4. Dip each chicken piece into the butter, then place it in the paper bag and shake to coat evenly.
5. Place the coated chicken on a foil-lined baking sheet.
6. Bake for 45 minutes. Serve hot.
